name: Quick Chicken Piccata
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the chicken dry. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Melt butter and oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken and cook until it is springy to the touch, about 4 minutes per side. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.
4. Increase the heat to high. Stir in the broth and vermouth into the skillet.
5. Boil until reduced by half, scraping up any browned bits. Remove from heat.
6. Mix in the lemon juice and capers.
7. Place chicken on plates and pour sauce over.
8. Garnish with lemon slices.
4 servings.
